actions.name: Contract Review
actions.description: Comprehensive review of commercial contracts, MSAs, PSAs, and vendor agreements. Extracts parties, obligations, key dates, payment terms, termination rights, IP provisions, and liability clauses.

actions.name: NDA Analysis
actions.description: Deep analysis of non-disclosure agreements, confidentiality agreements, and CDAs. Extracts confidential information definition, obligations, exclusions, duration, and remedies.

actions.name: Lease Agreement Review
actions.description: Analysis of commercial and residential leases including NNN, office, and retail leases. Extracts rent, escalation, renewal options, permitted use, and landlord/tenant obligations.

actions.name: Invoice Processing
actions.description: Validation and processing of vendor invoices, utility bills, subscription invoices, and AP processing documents. Extracts vendor info, line items, financial totals, payment terms, and performs validation checks.

actions.name: SLA Analysis
actions.description: Review of service level agreements, managed service SLAs, and cloud SLAs. Extracts SLOs, measurement methodology, credits, escalation procedures, and maintenance exclusions.

actions.name: Employment Agreement Review
actions.description: Review of offer letters, employment contracts, and contractor agreements. Extracts compensation, equity, IP assignment, non-compete, non-solicit, and severance provisions.

actions.name: Statement of Work Analysis
actions.description: Analysis of SOWs, work orders, task orders, and project orders. Extracts deliverables, milestones, acceptance criteria, fees, and change order provisions.

actions.name: General Legal Document Review
actions.description: Review of any unclassified legal document. Performs document classification, identifies parties and dates, maps obligations, and generates a risk summary.

skills.name: Citation Extraction
skills.description: Cite every claim with [Section: X, Page Y] format

skills.name: Risk Flagging
skills.description: Highlight clauses requiring legal review with [RISK: HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW] severity ratings

skills.name: Summary Generation
skills.description: Generate executive summary in 3-5 bullet points at start of response

skills.name: Date Extraction
skills.description: Extract and normalize all dates to ISO 8601 in a Key Dates table

skills.name: Party Identification
skills.description: Identify all parties with full legal names, roles, and contact details

skills.name: Obligation Mapping
skills.description: Map mutual obligations into a structured Party/Obligation/Condition/Deadline table

skills.name: Defined Terms
skills.description: Extract all defined terms into an alphabetical Defined Terms Glossary

skills.name: Financial Terms
skills.description: Extract monetary amounts, payment schedules, rates, and financial obligations

skills.name: Termination Analysis
skills.description: Analyze termination triggers, notice periods, cure periods, and consequences

skills.name: Jurisdiction and Governing Law
skills.description: Identify applicable law, jurisdiction, and dispute resolution mechanism

knowledge.name: Common Contract Terms Glossary
knowledge.description: Definitions for 50+ standard contract terms (A-W) including acceptance, amendment, arbitration, assignment, breach, cap on liability, confidential information, force majeure, governing law, indemnification, IP, limitation of liability, representations and warranties, severability, termination, and waiver.

knowledge.name: NDA Review Checklist
knowledge.description: 20-item checklist for NDA review covering party identification, purpose, confidential information definition and scope, standard exclusions, standard of care, permitted use, permitted disclosure, required disclosures, agreement term, survival of obligations, return/destruction, injunctive relief, damages limitations, residuals clause, mutual vs. one-way structure, non-solicitation, and governing law.

knowledge.name: Lease Agreement Standards
knowledge.description: Commercial lease standards covering base rent and escalation (fixed, CPI, fair market), operating expense structures (gross, NN, NNN, modified gross, full-service gross), controllable vs. uncontrollable expense caps, premises definition, permitted use, exclusive use rights, lease term, renewal/expansion/termination options, tenant improvement allowance, alterations, assignment and subletting, insurance requirements, indemnification, events of default, and holdover provisions.

knowledge.name: Invoice Processing Guide
knowledge.description: AP invoice processing guide covering invoice types (standard, recurring, progress billing, retainage, credit memo, pro forma, self-billing), required fields, three-way and two-way matching, matching tolerances, duplicate detection, vendor master file validation, PO validation, contract compliance, tax validation, exception handling with 10 exception codes, escalation matrix, payment terms (Net 30/60/90, 2/10 Net 30, EOM), and approval workflow with delegation rules.

knowledge.name: SLA Metrics Reference
knowledge.description: SLA/SLO/SLI definitions, availability tiers (99.0% through 99.999% with annual/monthly downtime), scheduled maintenance exclusions, response time/latency metrics (p50/p95/p99/p99.9), throughput, error rate targets, incident severity levels (P1-P4) with response time and resolution SLAs, data durability, RPO/RTO tiers, tiered service credit schedules, credit caps, measurement methodology, and monthly availability reporting.

knowledge.name: Employment Law Quick Reference
knowledge.description: US employment law fundamentals covering at-will employment and exceptions, employee vs. independent contractor classification (behavioral/financial/type of relationship tests, California ABC test), FLSA minimum wage and overtime, non-compete agreements (state-by-state enforceability), non-solicitation, DTSA immunity notice requirement, work made for hire, invention assignment and moonlighting protection statutes, FMLA, ADA, USERRA, WARN Act, separation agreements, and OWBPA requirements for ADEA releases.

knowledge.name: IP Assignment Clause Library
knowledge.description: Annotated IP assignment clauses including broad work product assignment, work-performed-for assignment, independent contractor work-for-hire and assignment, background IP definition and license-back, prior inventions exclusion schedule, AI/ML-specific model and training data assignment, open source compliance clause, moral rights waiver, future patents assignment with power of attorney, and moonlighting protection statute compliance.

knowledge.name: Termination and Remedy Provisions
knowledge.description: Comprehensive termination and remedy reference covering termination for cause triggers (material breach, insolvency, breach of R&Ws, regulatory events), notice and cure periods, automatic vs. right-to-terminate, termination for convenience with standard notice periods, termination fees, post-termination transition assistance, return and destruction of data, survival of provisions, money damages types, mutual waiver of consequential damages with carve-outs, liquidated damages, injunctive relief, exclusive remedy provisions, and set-off rights.

knowledge.name: Governing Law and Jurisdiction Guide
knowledge.description: Governing law and dispute resolution reference covering what governing law determines, common US law choices (Delaware, New York, California, Texas, Illinois), international choices (English law, CISG exclusion), conflict-of-law exclusions, exclusive vs. non-exclusive jurisdiction, arbitration (AAA/JAMS/ICC/LCIA/SIAC/ICDR), seat vs. venue, essential arbitration clause elements, carve-outs from arbitration, tiered dispute resolution, interim relief, New York Convention enforcement.

knowledge.name: Legal Document Red Flags Catalog
knowledge.description: 32 red flags across 10 categories with severity ratings covering liability/indemnification (uncapped indemnification, asymmetric indemnification), payment/financial (automatic escalation without cap, unilateral price change), termination (no T4C right, immediate acceleration), data/privacy (vendor data ownership claim), IP (broad work product ownership), contract structure (automatic renewal without notification, unilateral modification), dispute resolution, confidentiality (residuals clause), employment/personnel, and miscellaneous flags.

tools.name: DocumentSearch
tools.description: Search knowledge base and document index for relevant content matching a query

tools.name: AnalysisRetrieval
tools.description: Retrieve previously computed analysis results for a specific document or analysis session

tools.name: KnowledgeRetrieval
tools.description: Retrieve specific knowledge source content by identifier or type from the knowledge store

tools.name: TextRefinement
tools.description: Refine, reformat, or restructure a text section using AI-assisted editing

tools.name: CitationExtractor
tools.description: Extract and normalize citation references from analysis results and document text

tools.name: SummaryGenerator
tools.description: Generate structured summaries of document sections or complete documents

tools.name: RedFlagDetector
tools.description: Detect risk indicators, problematic clauses, and compliance issues in document text

tools.name: PartyExtractor
tools.description: Extract and normalize party information (people, organizations, roles) from document text

modelSelectionRules.reason: Bounded decision with well-defined categories; speed over depth
Binary or categorical decisions; speed matters more than depth
Multi-faceted analysis with nuanced reasoning requires full model
Accurate extraction of structured data from unstructured text requires strong reasoning
TL;DR and bullet summaries are well-handled by mini
Comprehensive summaries with citations need full model
Legal analysis requires nuanced interpretation and risk assessment
Financial computations and reconciliation require accuracy
